args.task_description:
枚举一个资产管理系统的Web路径。目标URL: http://10.0.162.114:80。使用Python requests库，尝试访问以下常见路径，记录返回状态码不是404的路径：

常见路径列表：
/login, /register, /signup, /home, /main, /index.html, /assets, /assets/list, /assets/search, /assets/report, /api/v1, /api/login, /api/user, /api/assets, /api/search, /api/report, /user, /users, /manage, /management, /query, /export, /import, /upload, /download, /console, /debug, /swagger, /docs, /static, /favicon.ico, /assets/manage, /asset/search, /asset/report, /asset/list, /system, /config, /info, /status, /health, /api/assets/search, /api/assets/report, /report/generate, /search/asset

对每个路径分别尝试GET和POST方法，记录状态码和重定向信息。

args.task_description:
对目标 http://10.0.162.114:80 进行深入路径枚举和登录探测。

1. 先访问根路径 / 并打印完整响应（状态码、headers、body前2000字符）
2. 尝试POST /login，分别用以下Content-Type：
   - application/x-www-form-urlencoded，数据：username=admin&password=admin
   - application/json，数据：{"username":"admin","password":"admin"}
   打印完整响应
3. 枚举更多路径（GET请求），记录非404的：
   /admin, /dashboard, /logout, /reset, /forgot, /profile, /setting, /settings, /help, /about, /contact,
   /api, /api/v1/users, /api/v1/assets, /api/v1/search, /api/v1/report, /api/v1/login, /api/v1/auth,
   /sql, /debug, /test, /dev, /backup, /db, /database, /phpmyadmin, /adminer,
   /static/css/style.css, /static/js/main.js, /templates, /migrations,
   /swagger.json, /swagger-ui, /openapi.json, /graphql,
   /sitemap.xml, /crossdomain.xml, /web.config,
   /robots.txt (already done), /.git/config, /flag, /flag.txt, /secret, /hint
